work_items.title: Build Home dashboard API wiring
work_items.description: Expose local Home dashboard and local project report data through read-only Hub API endpoints for the AresForge active project.
work_items.notes: Completed in M16 commit 30e9666. Reconciliation item only; no new implementation required.
work_items.validation_summary: M16 Home dashboard API wiring was implemented and validated as part of the completed M16 local Hub foundation work.
work_items.evidence_note: Reconciled stale bootstrap planning item after M16 completion.
tests_run: Core targeted validation passed with 232 tests. Hub/read-model targeted validation passed with 96 tests.
